name_en: BV Mini Solstice latest shoulder bag, summer relaxation, it's really cute. The Knot metal knot decoration on both sides adds interest. BV's recent soul element, not every bag has this. Compared to the other two sizes, this mini is more elegant and exquisite. Niche and unique, can be sweet or cool.

Size: 28*18*Depth 5cm
